title: hieracium caesium subsp. farinisquamum
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. farinisquamum, commonly known as the lesser hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium caesium subsp. farinisquamum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
